name: Manifest: Vision Board & 369
subtitle: Gratitude Journal & Numerology
description:
Manifest is a mystical gratitude journal built for people who want more than a blank page — an AI-elevated space for gratitude, daily numerology, Tesla's 369 method, and vision boards, all in one ritual.

Open the app each morning and see your personal numerology reading, drawn from your birth date — a small, daily nudge toward the day ahead. Write freely in your gratitude journal, and let AI gently elevate your entries into clearer, more intentional reflections without ever putting words in your mouth. Practice Tesla's 369 method, the three-times-a-day writing ritual believers say sharpens focus and manifests intention. Build vision boards with clean grid layouts so your goals stay visible, not buried in a notes app. And keep your practice alive with streaks, streak freeze for the days life gets in the way, Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets, and Live Activities that follow your ritual in real time.

WHAT'S INSIDE
 AI-elevated journaling — write it raw, let Gemini help elevate it into gratitude
 Daily numerology — a personal reading every day, based on your birth date
 369 method — Tesla's 3x-a-day manifestation ritual, guided step by step
 Vision boards — grid-based boards to keep your goals in view
 Streaks & widgets — streak freeze, Home Screen & Lock Screen widgets, Live Activities

Manifest is designed for anyone building a gratitude practice, exploring numerology, following the 369 method, or just trying to give their goals a visible home. No pressure, no comparison — just your own quiet ritual, one day at a time.

3-day free trial, then $24.99/year or $3.99/week.

Begin your ritual today — open Manifest and see what today's numbers have to say, and let one small daily practice add up over time.
promotionalText: Your daily ritual: gratitude, numerology, and Tesla's 369 method — all in one mystical space. Vision boards, streaks, and widgets keep your goals close every day.
whatsNew: Manifest just got bigger. Now available in 20 languages, with Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets, Siri Shortcuts, a Live Activity for your ritual in progress, and streak protection so one busy day won't break your streak. Reminders are smarter, everything feels faster and smoother, and we've squashed a batch of bugs along the way. Update now and keep manifesting.
